name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions a hardened Nginx reverse proxy serving three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local) with self-signed certificate generation, HTTP→HTTPS redirects, security header injection, fail2ban intrusion prevention, UFW firewall rules, and kernel-level sysctl security tuning.

name: cache
description: Configures a dual caching layer combining Memcached (via the community memcached cookbook) and Redis (via redisio) with password authentication, a dedicated log directory, and a post-install Ruby block that strips deprecated Redis config directives for version compatibility.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a Python FastAPI application from a public GitHub repository, including Python 3 runtime setup, virtual environment creation, pip dependency installation, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, .env file generation with database credentials, and systemd service lifecycle management.
